name: knowledge_base_search
description: Search a Bedrock Knowledge Base for relevant content. Returns chunks of text from documents that match the query, with relevance scores and source information.

query.description: Search query for finding relevant content in the knowledge base

knowledge_base_id.description: The ID of the Bedrock Knowledge Base to search. Optional if a default is configured.

max_results.description: Maximum number of chunks to return (default 10, max 25)
